art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026 confirms 4% growth to $59.6B for 2025; sector outlook remains 'Cautious Optimism' for Q1 2026
Current exhibitions: Whitney Biennial 2026, Arthur Jafa's 'The White Album' (Hammer Museum), Anna Maria Maiolino's 'Poetic Earth' (NYC)
Auction sector tracking steady; high-end ($10M+) works continuing to drive volume as Q1 2026 concludes
Digital art and local dealer engagement remain the primary growth vectors for March/April 2026
Regional focus: U.S. (44% share) followed by UK and China; increasing Middle East market engagement observed

market_summary.market_sentiment: Stable growth with high resilience in high-value assets; dealer focus shifting toward local/regional collectors
market_summary.key_drivers: High-end auction resilience, younger collector demographic growth, digital/hybrid gallery adoption
market_summary.trend: U.S. dominance (44%); 43% of market stakeholders forecast continued expansion through H1 2026
